summary: Learn Page CMS comprehensive testing completed. All requested features verified: 12 topic cards from CMS, Ask Mira search bar with CMS placeholder, Daily Learning Tip, 3 Help Buckets, and personalization (pet name 'Mojo' correctly appears in title for logged-in user). Topic cards are clickable and open modal with Overview, Videos, Products, Services tabs. Backend APIs GET/POST /api/learn/page-config working correctly.

backend_tests.GET /api/learn/page-config: PASSED - Returns 12 topics, 4 dailyTips, 3 helpBuckets, config with title '{petName}' placeholder
backend_tests.POST /api/learn/page-config: PASSED - Successfully saves all CMS data and returns success:true
backend_tests.page_config_structure: PASSED - config, topics, selectedBundles, selectedProducts, selectedServices, dailyTips, guidedPaths, helpBuckets

frontend_tests.learn_page_loads: PASSED - /learn shows all 12 topic cards from CMS
frontend_tests.ask_mira_search_bar: PASSED - Visible with CMS placeholder 'Grooming guide for double coats... tips to stop barking'
frontend_tests.daily_learning_tip: PASSED - Shows tip from CMS dailyTips array with category and color
frontend_tests.help_buckets_section: PASSED - 3 buckets: Products & Routines, Life Stage & Care, Support & Services
frontend_tests.personalization: PASSED - Logged in user (dipali@clubconcierge.in) sees 'What would you like to learn about Mojo today?'
frontend_tests.topic_card_click: PASSED - Opens modal with title, description, tabs (Overview/Videos/Products/Services), subtopics list

verified_features: 12 topic cards displayed from CMS (puppy-basics, breed-guides, food-feeding, grooming, behavior, training-basics, travel-with-dogs, senior-dog-care, health-basics, rescue-indie-care, seasonal-care, new-pet-parent-guide)
Ask Mira search bar with CMS-configured placeholder
Daily Learning Tip section with rotating tips (based on date index)
How can we help? section with 3 help buckets from CMS
Personalization: {petName} placeholder replaced with actual pet name 'Mojo' for logged-in user
Topic modal opens with Overview, Videos, Products, Services tabs
Backend GET /api/learn/page-config returns complete CMS data
Backend POST /api/learn/page-config saves all CMS data successfully
context_for_next_testing_agent: Learn Page CMS fully functional. API endpoints GET/POST /api/learn/page-config handle topics (12), dailyTips, helpBuckets, and config with {petName} personalization. Logged-in user sees pet name 'Mojo' in title. Topic modal has 4 tabs: Overview, Videos, Products, Services.

personalization_verified.template: What would you like to learn about {petName} today?
personalization_verified.logged_in_result: What would you like to learn about Mojo today?
personalization_verified.guest_result: What would you like to learn about your dog today?
